title: Routescan Transaction
description: Represents a normal (external) EVM transaction returned by the txlist action.

blockNumber.description: Block number in which the transaction was included.

nonce.description: Sender nonce at the time of this transaction.

blockHash.description: Hash of the block containing this transaction.

transactionIndex.description: Position of the transaction within the block.

value.description: Native token amount transferred in Wei.

gas.description: Gas limit set by the sender.

isError.description: 0 if the transaction succeeded; 1 if it reverted.

txreceipt_status.description: Transaction receipt status (1 = success, 0 = fail). Empty for pre-Byzantium txns.

contractAddress.description: Address of the created contract, if this was a deployment transaction.

cumulativeGasUsed.description: Cumulative gas used in the block up to and including this transaction.

gasUsed.description: Actual gas consumed by this transaction.

confirmations.description: Number of block confirmations since this transaction was included.

methodId.description: First 4 bytes of the call data (function selector).

functionName.description: Decoded function name from the ABI if available.
